reasoning: The Manifold market estimates a 96% probability that China's 2025 rebar failure rate will be below 20%. Historically, SAMR spot checks for rebar had unqualified rates well below 20% (e.g., 8.6% in 2021, 4.6% in 2020). While a 2023 investigation found a 22.9% failure rate, the subsequent implementation of the mandatory GB 1499.2-2024 standard in late 2024, coupled with strict market supervision, strongly incentivizes compliance. General product quality national spot failure rates typically hover around 10-14% (e.g., 14.3% in 2024). Furthermore, national summary reports for the previous year are usually released around May of the following year (e.g., May 2025 for 2024 results); thus, the results for the 2025 check should arrive soon. Given the 20% threshold is generous compared to historical averages and the market certainty is high, the probability of resting below 20% is extremely likely. I decay the probability towards 0.5 for the later nominal resolution dates per the instructions.
